About Johannes Fahrenkrug

I began programming when I was 12. That's years ago and I still love it. Check out my CV.

  • I've been freelancing since early 2007.
  • I mainly develop for iOS and OS X.
  • I'm the co-author of the book "Objective-C Fundamentals".
  • I am active in the open source community.
  • I frequently attend and speak at conferences. Come up and say Hi when you see me!
  • I teach and coach: Ask me when you want to get started with iOS development.
  • I used to do security consulting. I've found security holes on Apple's and Google's websites.
